{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230226444163D02D9E6AA4F46847"}"},"total":1085},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7178116096019514116","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我觉得很好看，就和其他这类型的小说不一样，有一些主角就很屌丝，但是这个真的很好看，男性转成女也很有意思，故事也很精彩，但是我很好奇那个主角弟弟最后有没有完成自己的梦想[哭][哭]
作者大大给个回复，弟弟的梦想成真了吗[送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671285513,"group_id":"7129339334670421000","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"创作小说是为了满足自己的精神需求","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5z5TPv0IHG+cnoZWkeRvVtJCbnpqXRsa7OJUjtiNjtR","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ee76760d48d040a4a506b4f9637f879e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794034&x-signature=hkhY7DtlIwey38ErW7xN9Rujqes%3D","user_id":"2920783157407885","user_name":"你说梨不离谱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2920783157407885","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7129339334670421000","book_info":{"abstract":"罗蓝因得了痔疮死亡，穿越成为一名外卖员
而且还是一名妹子，送外卖五星好评就变强
她为了好评，开始各种整活
“震惊，一外卖员为了好评竟出卖色相。”
网友们看见倾城绝色的女神外卖员，连夜刷数万单导致平台崩溃
“顾客让你扇渣男一巴掌，你小费五五分有钱一起赚。”
“顾客让你厕所送纸，你送红纸和绿纸，顾客哭着点好评。”
“顾客让你看网恋对象，是男的，你就拍自己照片。”
全网哭笑不得的时候，逐渐发现这个外卖员太全能了吧
“女神，求求你别整活了，大伙都怕外卖里有毒。”
罗蓝小脸一红，俏皮的眨了眨眼睛
“为了我的五星好评没办法呀。”
“喜欢吃外卖的老铁，记得留下收藏和好评哦。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b1977d30ba775ad4a09b68b44931cb81","author":"罗莉小妹","author_id":"","book_id":"7129339334670421000","book_name":"女装外卖员，全网跪求我别整活！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":75,"name":"外卖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=75&name=外卖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7129354089925706280","read_count":"943","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"300043"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"124","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,直播,外卖,多女主,无敌,都市异能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a9ff3cda5a41f134025efce0b626df09~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779388004&x-signature=OKEU1o77b7u317ZXAhyYQAd8oHM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_l
